data.meter_type_description: Select 'Water' for a water meter or 'Electric' for an electricity meter. You can add both by setting up this integration twice.
data.base_url_description: The base URL of your Sensus Analytics portal (e.g., https://my-clync.sensus-analytics.com).
data.unit_type_description: Display unit for usage. Water: 'gal' or 'CCF'. Electric: 'kWh'.
data.tier1_units_description: Maximum units in Tier 1. Leave blank if your utility has no tier limit.
data.tier1_price_description: Price per unit for Tier 1 usage.
data.tier2_units_description: Maximum units in Tier 2. Leave blank if not applicable.
data.tier2_price_description: Price per unit for Tier 2 usage.
data.tier3_price_description: Price per unit for Tier 3 usage.
data.service_fee_description: Fixed monthly charge from your utility regardless of usage.

error.auth: Authentication failed. Please check your username and password.

water_yesterday_total_usage.name: Water Yesterday Total Usage
water_yesterday_total_usage.description: Total water usage for yesterday from the widget API.

water_today_usage.name: Water Today Usage
water_today_usage.description: Estimated water usage today, calculated as odometer delta since midnight. Persists across HA restarts.

water_yesterday_same_hour_usage.name: Water Yesterday Same Hour Usage
water_yesterday_same_hour_usage.description: Water usage at this same hour yesterday. For comparison only — not for Energy Dashboard.

water_lifetime_total_usage.name: Water Lifetime Total Usage
water_lifetime_total_usage.description: Total cumulative water usage ever recorded by the meter. Use this in the Energy Dashboard.

water_billing_cycle_usage.name: Water Current Billing Cycle Usage
water_billing_cycle_usage.description: Total water usage accumulated in the current billing cycle.

water_billing_cost.name: Water Estimated Billing Cost
water_billing_cost.description: Estimated cost for the current billing cycle based on configured tier prices and service fee.

water_daily_cost.name: Water Estimated Daily Cost
water_daily_cost.description: Estimated water cost for yesterday based on configured tier prices.

electric_yesterday_total_usage.name: Electric Yesterday Total Usage
electric_yesterday_total_usage.description: Total electricity usage for yesterday from the widget API.

electric_yesterday_same_hour_usage.name: Electric Yesterday Same Hour Usage
electric_yesterday_same_hour_usage.description: Electricity usage at this same hour yesterday. For comparison only — not for Energy Dashboard.

electric_lifetime_total_usage.name: Electric Lifetime Total Usage
electric_lifetime_total_usage.description: Total cumulative electricity usage ever recorded by the meter. Use this in the Energy Dashboard.

electric_billing_cycle_usage.name: Electric Current Billing Cycle Usage
electric_billing_cycle_usage.description: Total electricity usage accumulated in the current billing cycle.

electric_billing_cost.name: Electric Estimated Billing Cost
electric_billing_cost.description: Estimated cost for the current electricity billing cycle.

shared_meter_address.name: Meter Address
shared_meter_address.description: Service address associated with this meter.

shared_last_read.name: Last Read
shared_last_read.description: Timestamp of the last meter reading received by the utility.

shared_last_data_timestamp.name: Last Data Timestamp
shared_last_data_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the most recent hourly data point available.

shared_yesterday_rainfall.name: Yesterday Same Hour Rainfall
shared_yesterday_rainfall.description: Rainfall at this same hour yesterday.

shared_yesterday_temperature.name: Yesterday Same Hour Temperature
shared_yesterday_temperature.description: Temperature at this same hour yesterday.
